title: Add Mermaid flowchart for structured concurrency lifecycle
description: ferrum-introduction-to-async.md explains structured concurrency in prose: scope starts, tasks spawn, cancellation signal propagates, tasks drain, scope exits. The key guarantee — tasks cannot outlive their scope — is subtle and easy to miss in text. A flowchart or sequence diagram showing the full lifecycle (including early-return and panic paths) would make the guarantee visually obvious.
